stemHtml: The limits of the yellow arc (caution speed range) of an airspeed indicator are…

options.a: VNO for the lower limit and VNE for the upper limit.
options.b: VLE for the lower limit and VNE for the upper limit.
options.c: VLO for the lower limit and VNE for the upper limit.
options.d: VFE for the lower limit and VNE for the upper limit.
